Interface IRasterColormap3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a raster colormap.

[Guid("0EAD5A24-A135-46EE-ACC2-2CB6181F1C2B")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRasterColormap3 : IRasterColormap2, IRasterColormap
